SOLFERINO BOX_19cm
A must-have hot seller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, simply too fun!
